title: Champala's star

The [[Chagri system]] in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]]<ref name="EAOC" /> and [[Northern Dependencies/Legends|Northern Dependencies]]<ref name="Region" /> contained a '''star''' that was orbited by several [[Planet/Legends|planets]],<ref name="Codex" /> including [[Champala/Legends|Champala]]. The [[Star/Legends|star]] underwent a period of instability early in the evolutionary history of Champala, and as a result the [[Chagrian/Legends|Chagrian]] [[Species/Legends|species]] that evolved on Champala possessed a natural resistance to [[Radiation/Legends|radiation]].<ref name="Ultimate" />

==Behind the scenes==
Champala's star was first mentioned in the [[2001]] sourcebook ''[[Alien Anthology]]'', and it has received mentions in a number of subsequent sourcebooks and in the Codex of the [[BioWare]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'', though the star's name has never been specified.
